# SweeFi

> Open-source agentic payment infrastructure for Sui

SweeFi is the TypeScript SDK and Move smart contract suite that lets AI agents pay for services autonomously using the s402 protocol (HTTP 402 Payment Required) on the Sui blockchain.

## What SweeFi Does

SweeFi enables machine-to-machine commerce. An AI agent discovers a paid API, the server responds with HTTP 402 and a price, the agent signs a Sui transaction, and the server settles on-chain. No API keys, no subscriptions, no platform fees.

## Five Payment Schemes

- Exact: One-shot payments (x402-compatible)
- Prepaid: Agent budgets with batch settlement (~70x gas savings)
- Escrow: Trustless digital commerce with arbiter disputes
- Stream: Micropayments with rate limits and budget caps
- SEAL: Pay-to-decrypt via threshold encryption (no trusted third party)

## Packages

- @sweefi/sui: Sui PTB builders, s402 client, wallet adapters
- @sweefi/server: Hono middleware for s402-gated APIs
- @sweefi/mcp: 35 MCP tools for Claude Desktop
- @sweefi/cli: Terminal interface for agent payments
- @sweefi/ui-core: Framework-agnostic payment UI core
- @sweefi/react: React hooks and components
- @sweefi/vue: Vue 3 composables and components
- @sweefi/solana: Solana adapter (cross-chain)
- @sweefi/ap2-adapter: Google AP2 mandate adapter
- @sweefi/facilitator: Self-hostable settlement service

## Links

- Documentation: https://docs.sweefi.xyz
- GitHub: https://github.com/sweeinc/sweefi
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/org/sweefi
- Protocol: https://s402-protocol.org

## Technical Details

- 847 tests (601 TypeScript + 246 Move)
- 10 Move smart contract modules
- Apache 2.0 license with patent grant
- ~400ms settlement finality on Sui
- $0.014 per 1,000 API calls (prepaid batching)

## Contact

- Built by Swee Group LLC
- Creator: Danny Devs (https://dannydevs.com)
